embeds.title: 📜 Legend Lore
embeds.description:
The pervasive misty gloom seems to react to your casting, swirling violently about the Arcanum tower as the spell is spoken. Your mind is flooded with visions and memories not your own. You see a stone obelisk in the courtyard of the Queen's palace - a shimmering, opalescent stone, wrapped in bands of gold and etched with runes. Simultaneously, as if through the other eye, you see within it; the nascent Demiplane of Lust and a woman who bears an uncanny resemblance to Queen Sel'ani.

Years pass in the blink of an eye, with the obelisk unmoving from that spot in Queen Sel'ani's courtyard. Motes and fragments of lustful energy drawn to it like a lodestone, and all the while it shimmers and radiates magic. While decades pass in the material realm, centuries or millennia pass within the obelisk, the lustful energies growing within, shaping the shapeless into a vast domain of delight.

You witness the shattering, spoken of only in hushed tones. A purple-robed man, features hidden beneath a cowl and hood, approaches and lays a hand on the obelisk. The opalescent stone cracks, shatters and explodes outward as the magic is forcefully dispelled. Within, the sky of the demiplane cracks and implodes inward. The demiplane and the city of Ost seem to turn inside out and outside in, pulling through one another until the city of Ost transported wholly into the demiplane built within the obelisk.

Finally, you witness the shards in the present. The fragments of the obelisk, which had been both prison and chrysalis, propelled like shrapnel from the force of the explosion. Even shattered, the shards attempt to perform the purpose of their whole. Each still absorbing lust, the raw power of the demiplane's magic that they've absorbed trapped within.
